title: Home Screen - Disconnecting/Connecting one earbud at a time
scenario: Verify individual earbud disconnect/reconnect behavior on the Home Screen, including greyed-out states and connection status updates when disconnecting and reconnecting one or both earbuds.
steps: Connect both earbuds to the device.
Disconnect only the right earbud by placing it in the charge case (close the charge case if needed).
Verify the right earbud image and battery indicator are greyed out, while the left earbud remains connected and the overall device status shows 'Connected'.
Verify the right earbud is no longer greyed out.
Verify the left earbud image and battery indicator are greyed out, while the right earbud remains connected and the overall device status shows 'Connected'.
Verify both earbuds are greyed out and the overall device status shows 'Disconnected'.
Verify the right earbud reconnects (not greyed out), the left earbud remains greyed out, and the overall device status shows 'Connected'.
Verify the left earbud reconnects (not greyed out), the right earbud remains greyed out, and the overall device status shows 'Connected'.
expected: All steps complete without issues. For Osprey devices, the charge case battery indicator does not grey out when only one earbud is connected.
